entities.name: Context Gathering
entities.context: Phase 1 of a strategic thinking framework focused on understanding challenges, constraints, goals, and success criteria

entities.name: Dynamic Exploration
entities.context: Phase 2 of a strategic thinking framework involving iterative cycles of challenge, exploration, and synthesis

entities.name: Active Nuances
entities.context: A technique or approach applied continuously during dynamic exploration

entities.name: Stress Testing
entities.context: Technique for validating logic and strategy during strategic analysis

entities.name: Synthesis Cycles
entities.context: Iterative pattern combining challenge, exploration, and synthesis in strategic thinking

relationships.context: Sequential phases where context gathering precedes dynamic exploration
Active nuances are applied continuously during dynamic exploration
Stress testing is used to validate logic and strategy during exploration
Dynamic exploration iterates through challenge, exploration, synthesis cycles
